title: antirrhinum sempervirens var. pertegasii
intro: Antirrhinum sempervirens var. pertegasii, also known as the perennial snapdragon, is a flowering plant belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Antirrhinum sempervirens var. pertegasii has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Antirrhinum sempervirens var. pertegasii can be infused in hot water to make a tea, or used in ointments and poultices to treat skin irritations and infections.
